subject: integrate sdnc sliboot container with  OOM
commit_message:
integrate sdnc sliboot container with  OOM

update oom with sdnc sliboot module

Patch Set 1:

I know it's a WIP but:

at this point of time in release, I assume it's for Guilin.

You must then follow the different elements in this page (commit messages, certificates, logs to stdout, hardcoded passwords, ...): https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/OOM+Guilin+release+plan (I've not taken a look in your proposal so not everything may apply)


If for Frankfurt, I need explanations on why we should merge into Frankfurt and TSC approval
